title: metrosideros cordata
intro: Metrosideros cordata, also known as the Yellow Kowhai or New Zealand Yellow Kowhai, is a small to medium-sized tree or shrub native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Metrosideros cordata are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and fighting off infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tincture, or ointment, making it a valuable resource in traditional New Zealand medicine.
